body:
No API design issues found. The `@azure/arm-communication` 5.0.0 TypeSpec migration looks clean:
- Package version (`5.0.0`) is aligned across `package.json`, `communicationServiceManagementContext.ts`, and `CHANGELOG.md`
- No `_N` suffixes, `AutoGenerated` suffixes, or `_` prefixes on public symbols
- No `unknown` in public return types; `void` is only on delete/action operations (appropriate per guidelines)
- No DOM name clashes (`Request`, `Response`, etc.)
- `KnownVersions` introduces `2025-09-01` and `2026-03-18`; no prior stable versions were removed
- Breaking changes are documented in `CHANGELOG.md`
- No alpha versions in any files

<details>
<summary>📊 Structured Report</summary>

```json
{"agent":"mgmt-reviewer","pr":38113,"summary":"clean","findings":[]}
```

</details>

## Next Steps to Merge
Only failed checks and required actions are listed below.

- ❌ **UnitTest (ubuntu_22x_node / windows_20x_node / macoslatest_24x_node / windows_20x_browser)**: Stale test recordings — tests were recorded with `api-version=2025-09-01` but the generated code now uses `api-version=2026-03-18`, causing URI mismatch errors. Action: Re-record tests per the [test recording guide](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/blob/main/documentation/Quickstart-on-how-to-write-tests.md#run-tests-in-record-mode). Review [ADO logs](https://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/29ec6040-b234-4e31-b139-33dc4287b756/_build/results?buildId=6144152&view=results).
